details.test: Task 1: Create "Short Love 3" reading list with three poems
Task 2: Publish "City Night Experiment" with correct settings
Task 3: Follow three haiku poets and create "Morning Haiku" list
Task 4: Respond to weekly prompt and like three low-engagement responses
Task 5: Configure notification preferences (in-app and email)
Task 6: Report a poem containing "spoiler" as contains_spoilers
Task 7: Bookmark the oldest low-rated sonnet published before 2023
Task 8: Like top three trending spoken word poems between 1–3 minutes
Task 9: Comment on two popular nature poems by same author and follow
Task 10: Save draft and schedule publication for "Draft Scheduling Test"
